resources.string: Bridge BiBi floating ASR results and optional input-field context through the hooked input method via InputConnection.
Adjust the bottom capture area used by hooked input methods. Changes are best-effort in LSPosed/LSPatch and fall back safely to defaults if the hook process cannot read them.
Capture height: %1$d dp (also lifts the strip from the bottom edge)
Also lifts the strip from the bottom edge
Open the IME Bridge introduction, install steps, and troubleshooting guide
Unable to open the documentation link
Settings screen only. Does not affect hooked input methods.
Choose which BiBi Keyboard build the module connects to.
Manual targets never fall back. If the selected build is unavailable, PCM and clipboard bridge requests fail.
Auto prefers BiBi Keyboard Pro and falls back to the open-source build. Manual Pro or open-source targets do not fall back.
Inject the waveform and long-press capture strip into hooked keyboards.
Stops injecting the waveform and long-press recording area. Text insertion, IME visibility, and clipboard bridging stay available.
Shows the waveform and long-press recording area at the bottom of hooked keyboards. Changes apply the next time the keyboard window is shown.
Hide the idle waveform without disabling the long-press recording area.
Keeps the waveform visible while idle and recording.
Hides the waveform while idle. The long-press area stays active, and the waveform appears during recording. Changes apply the next time the keyboard window is shown.
